title: sphaerolobium benetectum
intro: Sphaerolobium benetectum, also known as the "yellow and black jewel" or "Christmas tree orchid", is a flowering plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family. It is native to Western Australia and has been traditionally used by the Indigenous Australians for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating fever and colds. The plant is valued for its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Sphaerolobium benetectum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or extract, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and health benefits.
